---
title: "Detection idea: [Behavior or rule]"
labels: detection
---

## Detection Idea

Describe the behavior, rule, IOC bundle, or coverage gap.

## Telemetry Needed

List the fields or event types needed to make this reliable.

## False-Positive Considerations

What benign software, admin workflow, or developer workflow could match?

## Evidence or Prior Art

Add safe references, sanitized event examples, benchmark links, or related rules.

## Next Step

Should this become a rule proposal, a telemetry gap, a benchmark scenario, or remain a discussion?
